summary: Iteration 86: BIQc Homepage Motion System Refinement - ALL 32 TESTS PASSED. Verified Simplex noise-based particle drift, Perlin noise neural thread distortion, 8-second convergence glow pulse, corrected diagram sublabels, 6s BIQc core glow cycle, and 80px gap between learning statement and diagram. All animations rendering correctly.

tests: Canvas energy-galaxy-bg renders (data-testid='energy-galaxy-bg')
Canvas animation is running with requestAnimationFrame
Particles use Simplex noise-based drift (not linear velocity)
Neural threads visible with Perlin noise distortion
Travelling light pulses animate along neural threads (6-10s cycle)
Central convergence glow visible with 8-second pulse cycle
Hero viewport renders with rotating text (data-testid='hero-viewport')
Hero transitions use 8 second interval (INTERVAL=8000)
Hero opacity fade at 1.2 seconds (1200ms transition)
Hero navigation prev arrow (data-testid='hero-prev') visible and clickable
Hero navigation next arrow (data-testid='hero-next') visible and clickable
Hero text changes on arrow click - transition working
Protect/Stabilise/Strengthen block visible with orange ticks
Intelligence diagram section (data-testid='intelligence-diagram') renders
Business Signals text: 'What is happening across your systems' - EXACT MATCH
Watchtower text: 'Continuous monitoring across your tools' - EXACT MATCH
BIQc core node (data-testid='biqc-core-node') renders
BIQc core shows 'Business Intelligence Quotient Centre' text
Decision Support text: 'Clear signals that guide leadership decisions' - EXACT MATCH
BIQc core node has animated glow halo (6s corePulse animation)
BIQc core glow: box-shadow 0 0 40px/80px rgba(255,140,40) verified
80px gap between learning statement and diagram section (div with height:80px)
Integration carousel (data-testid='integration-carousel') renders
SVG brand logos in cards (HubSpot, Salesforce, Xero, Stripe, etc.)
25s loop animation (carouselLeft/carouselRight keyframes)
Carousel pauses on hover (animation-play-state: paused)
Nav login link (data-testid='nav-login') visible
Nav get-started button (data-testid='nav-get-started') visible
Stats section (data-testid='stats-section') renders
Cognition section (data-testid='cognition-section') renders
CTA section (data-testid='cta-section') renders
All sections render without layout breaks
Website footer (data-testid='website-footer') renders

animation_verification.layer_1_particles: 80-120 particles with Simplex noise2D drift, 1-3px size, 0.2-0.6 opacity, gaussian blur 2-6px, 20-30 second noise drift cycle
animation_verification.layer_2_neural_threads: 7 threads with Perlin noise distortion, 1.5px stroke, gradient #FF7A18-#FF9C45, outer glow rgba(255,140,40,0.25), travelling light pulse 6-10 second cycle
animation_verification.layer_3_convergence_glow: 500px radius, rgba(255,140,40) at 0.15 opacity, 8-second pulse cycle, scale 1.05
animation_verification.biqc_core_glow: box-shadow 0 0 40px rgba(255,140,40,0.35) + 0 0 80px rgba(255,140,40,0.15), 6 second loop (changed from 4s)
animation_verification.carousel_animation: 25s loop, pause on hover via CSS animation-play-state

diagram_text_verification.business_signals: What is happening across your systems
diagram_text_verification.decision_support: Clear signals that guide leadership decisions

critical_code_review_comments: Simplex noise implementation is correct - uses proper GRAD and PERM arrays for deterministic noise
Neural thread distortion uses noise2D correctly for both X and Y offsets
Convergence glow pulse uses Math.sin with 8-second cycle (t/8 * Math.PI * 2)
BIQc core glow animation duration updated to 6s as per spec
80px spacer div correctly placed between hero CTA and intelligence diagram
All diagram sublabels match exact spec wording
context_for_next_testing_agent: Motion system refinement complete. Key changes from iteration 85: 1) Particles now use Simplex noise-based drift instead of linear velocity, 2) Neural threads use Perlin noise distortion, 3) Convergence glow has 8-second pulse cycle, 4) BIQc core glow changed from 4s to 6s cycle, 5) 80px gap added between learning statement and diagram. All animations render correctly. No backend APIs - static marketing homepage.

mocked_api_confirmation.note: Homepage is static marketing page - no API calls required
